subject: The New York Times: When Trump Phones Friends, the Chinese Listen and Learn
body:
**When Trump Phones Friends, the Chinese Listen and Learn**
The New York Times

President Trump has been repeatedly told by aides that his cellphone calls are not secure from foreign spies. But he has refused to heed the warnings to stop talking. [Read the full story](#)

Shared from [Apple News](#)
